req.title: Patient portal login (boundary)
req.statement: A patient shall log in using SSO; failed attempts shall be rate-limited and notify the patient. Boundary cases on timestamps and numeric elements must be tested.

doc.reasoning: R-HLT-048 mandates SSO-based patient login with rate-limiting on failures and boundary handling on timestamps/numeric elements. Four tests are designed: (1) EP positive – valid SSO assertion establishes a session; (2) NEG negative – invalid SSO assertion is rejected without a session; (3) BVA boundary – exactly at the rate-limit threshold (N-1 failures then the Nth triggers 429); (4) STC state-transition – verifies the login state machine moves correctly from unauthenticated → authenticating → authenticated → session-active. Each test is self-contained using fixtures and helpers as placeholders to stay within the 40-line code limit.

tests.name: test_valid_sso_login_establishes_session
preconditions: A valid SSO assertion is available for patient user
No active session exists for the patient
actions: Submit a valid SSO assertion token
Capture the HTTP response and resulting URL
expected: Session cookie is present in the response
No error message displayed on screen
trace: R-HLT-048: 'A patient shall log in using SSO'
tests.executable:
import pytest
from playwright.sync_api import Page

def test_valid_sso_login_establishes_session(page: Page, valid_sso_token: str, base_url: str):
    page.goto(f"{base_url}/portal/login")
    <inject_sso_assertion>(page, valid_sso_token)
    page.wait_for_url("**/portal/dashboard", timeout=10000)
    cookies = page.context.cookies()
    session_cookie = next((c for c in cookies if c["name"] == "session"), None)
    assert session_cookie is not None, "Session cookie must be set after successful SSO login"
    assert page.url.endswith("/portal/dashboard"), f"Expected dashboard, got {page.url}"
    assert page.locator("[data-testid='error-banner']").count() == 0

tests.name: test_invalid_sso_assertion_is_rejected
preconditions: An expired or tampered SSO assertion is available
No active session exists for the patient
actions: Submit an invalid/expired SSO assertion token
Capture the HTTP response and page state
expected: Error message is displayed to the patient
trace: R-HLT-048: 'failed attempts shall … notify the patient'
tests.executable:
import pytest
from playwright.sync_api import Page

def test_invalid_sso_assertion_is_rejected(page: Page, invalid_sso_token: str, base_url: str):
    page.goto(f"{base_url}/portal/login")
    <inject_sso_assertion>(page, invalid_sso_token)
    page.wait_for_selector("[data-testid='error-banner']", timeout=8000)
    cookies = page.context.cookies()
    session_cookie = next((c for c in cookies if c["name"] == "session"), None)
    assert session_cookie is None, "Session cookie must NOT be set for invalid SSO"
    error_text = page.locator("[data-testid='error-banner']").inner_text()
    assert len(error_text) > 0, "Error message must be visible to the patient"
    assert page.url.endswith("/portal/login"), "Patient must remain on login page"

tests.name: test_rate_limit_triggers_on_nth_failed_attempt
preconditions: Rate-limit threshold N is known (default: 5 attempts)
Patient account exists; rate-limit counter is reset to 0
actions: Submit N-1 invalid SSO assertions; expect each to return 401
Submit the Nth invalid SSO assertion
Capture the HTTP status code and response body
expected: Response body contains rate-limit notification for the patient
trace: R-HLT-048: Error pathway – 429 when too many attempts
R-HLT-048: 'Boundary cases on … numeric elements must be tested'
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests

RATE_LIMIT_THRESHOLD = 5

def test_rate_limit_triggers_on_nth_failed_attempt(base_url: str, invalid_sso_token: str, reset_rate_limit: None):
    login_url = f"{base_url}/portal/login"
    headers = {"Content-Type": "application/x-www-form-urlencoded"}
    payload = <build_sso_payload>(invalid_sso_token)
    for attempt in range(1, RATE_LIMIT_THRESHOLD):
        resp = requests.post(login_url, data=payload, headers=headers, allow_redirects=False)
        assert resp.status_code == 401, f"Attempt {attempt}: expected 401, got {resp.status_code}"
    nth_resp = requests.post(login_url, data=payload, headers=headers, allow_redirects=False)
    assert nth_resp.status_code == 429, f"Nth attempt must return 429, got {nth_resp.status_code}"
    body = nth_resp.json()
    assert "rate" in body.get("message", "").lower() or "too many" in body.get("message", "").lower()

tests.name: test_login_state_machine_unauthenticated_to_active_session
preconditions: Valid SSO assertion with a timestamp within the accepted skew window
Patient starts in unauthenticated state (no existing session)
actions: Assert current state is UNAUTHENTICATED (no session cookie)
Submit valid SSO assertion; assert state transitions to AUTHENTICATING
Wait for redirect; assert final state is SESSION_ACTIVE at /portal/dashboard
Call /portal/api/session to verify session metadata including issued-at timestamp
expected: Session issued-at timestamp is within ±30 s of current UTC time
Session expiry timestamp is in the future
trace: R-HLT-048: 'Boundary cases on timestamps … must be tested'
tests.executable:
import pytest, time, requests
from playwright.sync_api import Page

TIMESTAMP_SKEW_TOLERANCE_S = 30

def test_login_state_machine_unauthenticated_to_active_session(page: Page, valid_sso_token: str, base_url: str):
    page.goto(f"{base_url}/portal/login")
    pre_cookies = page.context.cookies()
    assert not any(c["name"] == "session" for c in pre_cookies), "Must start unauthenticated"
    now_before = int(time.time())
    <inject_sso_assertion>(page, valid_sso_token)
    page.wait_for_url("**/portal/dashboard", timeout=10000)
    post_cookies = page.context.cookies()
    session_cookie = next((c for c in post_cookies if c["name"] == "session"), None)
    assert session_cookie is not None, "SESSION_ACTIVE: session cookie required"
    session_resp = requests.get(f"{base_url}/portal/api/session",
        cookies={"session": session_cookie["value"]})
    assert session_resp.status_code == 200
    data = session_resp.json()
    issued_at = data["issued_at"]
    expiry = data["expires_at"]
    assert abs(issued_at - now_before) <= TIMESTAMP_SKEW_TOLERANCE_S, "issued_at outside skew window"
    assert expiry > int(time.time()), "Session must not be already expired"
